2025 Big Game Draw Results - full public list of draw results

needs_manual.description: goHunt Nevada mule deer draw insights and application strategy
needs_manual.reason: Requires goHunt Insider subscription for full access

notes: The Excel file (2024-Nevada-Big-Game-Hunt-Data.xlsx) is the single most valuable file - contains quotas, applicants, tags issued, and harvest data for ALL species by unit for 2024.

Bonus point PDFs contain per-unit application counts by bonus point level, effectively showing draw odds (applicants vs tags at each point level). These are the primary draw odds data for Nevada since NDOW does not publish a simple draw odds table.
Nevada uses a squared bonus point system: (bonus_points^2 + 1) random numbers per applicant. The bonus point PDFs show how many applicants at each point level applied and drew for each unit.
The 2025 draw report and draw public list cover the most recent completed draw cycle.
The Big Game Status Books contain population estimates, trend data, and management objectives by unit.
NDOW publishes 2024 bonus point data as well (URLs in 2025/01/ and 2025/02/ paths) - not downloaded but available if prior year needed.
The draw-odds page at ndow.org/hunting/draw-odds/ returned 404; NDOW organizes this data under hunt-statistics and bonus-point-data pages instead.
